concept.pre:
Airspeeds for emergency operations:
Engine failure after takeoff: 60 Kias
Maneuvering speed (1670 lbs): 104 Kias
Maneuvering speed (1500 lbs): 98 Kias
Maneuvering speed (1350 lbs): 93 Kias
Maximum glide: 60 Kias
Precautionary landing with engine power: 55 Kias
Landing without engine power and flaps up: 65 Kias
Landing without engine power and flaps down: 60 Kias
What is the emergency airspeed for engine failure after takeoff?
60 Kias 55 Kias 65 Kias 95 Kias What is the emergency maneuvering air speed when loaded to 1670 gross weight?
104 Kias 98 Kias 93 Kias 125 Kias What is the emergency maneuvering air speed when loaded to 1500 gross weight?
98 Kias 104 Kias 93 Kias 125 Kias What is the emergency maneuvering air speed when loaded to 1350 gross weight?
93 Kias 104 Kias 98 Kias 125 Kias What is the air speed for the longest glide path?
60 Kias 55 Kias 65 Kias 70 Kias What air speed should be used for a precautionary landing with engine power?
55 Kias 60 Kias 65 Kias 70 Kias What air speed should be used for landing without engine power and flaps up?
65 Kias 60 Kias 55 Kias 70 Kias What air speed should be used for landing without engine power and flaps down?
60 Kias 65 Kias 55 Kias 70 Kias

Engine failure during takeoff run:
1. Set throttle to idle
2. Apply brakes
3. Retract wing flaps
4. Set mixture to idle cut-off
5. Turn magnetos off (I.E. ignition switch)
6. Turn master switch off
